title: Ho Hey
why_this_song: Ho Hey by The Lumineers (2012) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 13 times; first heard in: "(Ho!) I don't know where I belong"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "You're my sweetheart"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "(Ho!) I've been tryin' to do it right"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "You're my sweetheart"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "(Ho!) I've been sleepin' here instead"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "belong" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "belong" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "you're" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "you're" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Ho Hey" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Ho Hey"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask The Lumineers one question about "Ho Hey", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para The Lumineers sobre "Ho Hey", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Ho Hey" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Ho Hey" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
